billing_team.description: General billing inquiries including invoice errors and failed charges.

tech_support_l1.description: First-level technical support for bug reports, API errors, and integration issues.

tech_support_l2.description: Escalation-level technical support for complex or org-wide technical issues.

account_team.description: Account management including password resets, SSO issues, and account lockouts.

security_team.description: Security incidents including suspicious logins, exposure risks, and abuse reports.

shipping_team.description: Shipping and logistics including delays, tracking problems, and lost packages.

refund_team.description: Dedicated refund processing for approved billing refund requests.

spam_filter.description: Catch-all for non-actionable tickets: spam, marketing, false positives, and data errors.

sales_or_feature_requests.description: Feature requests and sales inquiries misfiled as support tickets.
